Aggregated bias — 6 main composites
Today's verdict VALID
🔴 RISK-OFF BIAS — Trim & hedge actively
Where is the market
Market zoneEUPHORIA
  • Market priced at 5-year extreme high (stress reading: +3.1, top of historical range)
  • Past data: at this level, market dropped 5% over the next 4 months, with hit rate 88% on past major selloffs
  • Topping stack quiet (1/3 active) — no euphoria signal
Volatility & sentiment
Fear gauge (VIX)18.4
  • Volatility spike warning MEDIUM (term structure inverted — short-term fear higher than long-term)
  • Past data: 68% chance fear gauge tops 25 in next 2 months
  • Tail risk pricing elevated (out-of-the-money puts expensive, score 1/3)
  • Sentiment composite: EUPHORIA — investors are too positive
  • Defensive rotation 1/3 — partial risk-off in sector internals
Cross-asset stress
  • TIP/TLT at extreme reading +3.14
  • V/MA at extreme reading +2.93
  • FXI/SPY at extreme reading -2.78
  • SMH/SPY at extreme reading +2.68
  • XLF/SPY at extreme reading -2.45
  • Rule: a single extreme is noise. Two or more pointing at the same theme (vol, credit, cyclicals) is a real signal.
Top tickers today
  • Multi-signal candidates (3+ Kerberos signals stacked): CVNA (score 4), IWF (score 4), NU (score 4), RDW (score 4), RIVN (score 4)
  • Capitulation candidates (oversold + heavy selling): IWF (3/3), CVNA (3/3), TTEK (3/3), WING (3/3), NVR (3/3)
  • Volume surge today (+10% on huge volume): AIFU 29.05%, HYLN 26.56%, FIGG 25.74%, SEDG 22.93%, GETY 20.66%
  • Cheap options (insurance underpriced, good for buyers): IMMP (0.00), APLS (0.02), BKNG (0.02), DD (0.03), CNTA (0.10)
What to do today
  • Cut long exposure: trim 30-50% on profitable positions
  • Buy insurance: small position in volatility products (1-2% of portfolio)
  • Avoid new bullish bets unless deeply oversold + safe-haven assets agree
  • Cap risk per trade: half of normal position size during this regime
  • Escalation rule: if vol spike rises to high tier or topping stack stays lit 3 days, go fully defensive
Most extreme readings today
Stress reading+3.09
  • Market stress reading +3.09 (EUPHORIA) — at +3 sigma is the top 1% of the 5-year history. Past data: SPY -5% in 4 months.
  • VIX term structure BACKWARDATION (VIX3M/VIX = 1.159) — short-term fear higher than long-term, regime change confirmation.
  • Tail risk pricing extreme (SKEW 146, z-1y -0.05) — out-of-money put protection getting expensive, smart money paying up for crash insurance.
  • TIP/TLT at +3.14 — stretched bullish on a 1-year basis. Cross-check with other ratios for confluence; solo extreme = noise per Kerberos rule.
  • V/MA at +2.93 — stretched bullish on a 1-year basis. Cross-check with other ratios for confluence; solo extreme = noise per Kerberos rule.
  • FXI/SPY at -2.78 — stretched bearish on a 1-year basis. Cross-check with other ratios for confluence; solo extreme = noise per Kerberos rule.
  • 5 stocks in capitulation triplet: IWF (3/3), CVNA (3/3), TTEK (3/3), WING (3/3), NVR (3/3). Each meets 3 of 3 conditions: oversold (RSI < 25), broken (drawdown > 20%), heavy selling. Watch for haven filter alignment before BTFD entry.
  • Volume surge breakouts: AIFU 29.05%, HYLN 26.56%, FIGG 25.74%, SEDG 22.93%, GETY 20.66%. Up 10%+ today on 200%+ of average volume. News, squeeze or momentum — fade if penny pump, follow if fundamentals support.
  • Cheapest options today (IV crushed below realized): IMMP (0.00), APLS (0.02), BKNG (0.02), DD (0.03), CNTA (0.10). Long premium (calls, straddles) attractive — vol mean-reverts higher historically.
  • Multi-signal confluence (3+ Kerberos signals stacked): CVNA (score 4), IWF (score 4), NU (score 4), RDW (score 4), RIVN (score 4). These are the highest-conviction candidates today — fundamentals/catalysts cross-check before sizing.
  • Sentiment composite at EUPHORIA (+4/8). Investors massively positioned bullish — historically a contrarian sell signal.
Guardrails before acting
Bullish points0Bearish points5Composites read6
  • Check earnings calendar for each ticker before trading (avoid surprise earnings exposure)
  • Verify catalysts (FDA, conferences, deal news) — composite score is necessary, not sufficient
  • Check options liquidity: spread under 5%, open interest above 100
  • 3-day persistence rule: signal must hold 3 days before sizing up
  • Today's score: 0 bullish points, 5 bearish points across 6 main composites

5y audit · 7 strategies · MCPT 5000× + Bonferroni · WINNER VIX sizing Sharpe 1.28
💡 Ideas Lab — Strategy Audit
🎯 Idée 6 — DEMA200 trend × VIX sizing combo beats SPY on 5 years
The audit verdict
Sharpe1.86Alpha/yr+12.6%Max DD-6.2%vs SPY Sharpe0.74p_bonf0.002VerdictSTRICT_VALID
Out of 7 ideas tested rigorously on 5 years (2021-05-17 → 2026-05-14, MCPT 5000× + Bonferroni n=7), only 1 strictly beats SPY: the top-10 confluence basket with Idée 6 — DEMA200 trend × VIX sizing combo (VIX-aware sizing 100% / 60% / 20% based on VIX < 15 / 15-25 / > 25). The combo halves the drawdown while maintaining alpha — exactly the hedge fund profile. Idée 1 (stock-level DEMA200 filter) is REJECTED (too restrictive in bull markets). Idée 2 (sectors) and Idée 4 (Trade of the Week) are MARGINAL but useful as premium tier products.
🎯 Trade of the Week — Live pick
TickerNXTSectorTechnologyScore56.5Confluence90/100Momentum 20d+22.6%RSI 1448.8
NXT picked by composite algorithm (confluence × momentum × DEMA50 × RSI<70 × sector top-5). 3 candidates passed filters from 0 raw confluence picks. Hold ~5 trading days, stop -8%, re-pick next Monday. Format ready for premium-tier newsletter weekly.

Full visual cockpit & reports
📊 View full Ideas Lab cockpit → — Alessio TM-style hero cards with equity curves SVG inline, 4 KPI cards XL, Trade of the Week, runner-ups, full methodology. Embeddable in Substack.

Reports: audit detailed · cockpit standalone · 21-strats parent audit · Alessio brainstorm
VIX-aware sizing is the only filter that improves the baseline confluence basket (Sharpe 1.86 vs baseline 0.61, vs SPY 0.74). Stock-level DEMA200 is too restrictive. Combo VIX × sectors over-filters. Trade of the Week is marginal but format-ready for weekly premium content.
How to read
Backtest universe: TOP_3000 Polygon stocks. Confluence top-10 baseline = PULLBACK/BOTTOM/SMART_FLOW/UNUSUAL/VSA/KERBEROS_RSI. Equal weight 10%, 14-day fixed rebalance, slippage 5bps/leg. **Idée 3** = position sizing 100%/60%/20% based on VIX regime. **Trade of the Week** = composite score with hard filters (DEMA50, RSI<70, sector top-5). Validation: 5000-perm MCPT + Bonferroni n=7. Regenerate: `python backtest_ideas_lab.py && python generate_ideas_lab_html.py`.

Options bursts on normally-dormant tickers · insider-like signal
🕵️ Sleeper Burst Radar NEW
🚨 4 INSIDER-LIKELY · 20 suspicious
Verdict
Total bursts 5d58EXCEPTIONAL (≥90)0INSIDER-LIKELY (75-89)4SUSPICIOUS (60-74)20
Bursts d'options sur tickers normalement dormants. Univers : ~1500 small/mid caps hors mega-caps (SPY/AAPL/NVDA exclus). Scoring 100 pts max combinant : vol/OI ratio, pre-burst OI (insider position fraîche), premium total, DTE court, REPEAT flag, timing EARLY.
Tiers : EXCEPTIONAL (≥90) = Telegram bypass cap · INSIDER-LIKELY (75-89) = Telegram dans la limite 3/jour · SUSPICIOUS (60-74) = cockpit only. Pas une recommandation de trade — c'est un signal d'attention.

Détection des spike options sur tickers small/mid cap dormants. Le pattern 'sleeper burst' (1 ticker normalement zéro-vol, soudain énorme premium sur 1 strike) est le proxy le plus fort d'insider trading public. Cross-check avec catalysts calendar (earnings, FDA) avant action.
How to read
Univers SLEEPER = ~1500 small/mid caps (<$10B market cap, hors top-100 SPX option-actifs). Source = signal_archive UNUSUAL/UNUSUAL_V3/SMART_FLOW × filtre sleeper. Refresh toutes les 30 min via cron pendant US trading hours. Score = vol/OI (30) + pre-OI<50 (20) + premium>$200K (15) + DTE<21 (10) + REPEAT (10) + timing EARLY (5) + base UNUSUAL (10). Refresh: `python sleeper_burst_detector.py --alert`.

01
Money-makers · 7-filter methodology
Best trades today VALID
🔥 Today's high-conviction trades
Thesis & methodology
RegimeEUPHORIATop sectorXLKBottom sectorXLUTrades2L / 3S
Today's read. The macro regime is EUPHORIA (xMarketTopMas EUPHORIA z=+3.09, VIX Spike tier 2). With xMarketTopMas at the top 1% of its 5-year range and VIX term structure inverted, the historical script is clear: the market is stretched and the next major move is mean-reversion lower. Backtest 11 years (12/16 Bonferroni-validated tests) says SPY drops -5% within 4 months from this z-score level, with hit rate 88% on past major selloffs. Trade selection follows the regime.

Why 3 shorts and 2 longs? Three reasons converge :
· Filter 1 (regime): EUPHORIA penalises new LONGs by -1.0 conviction. Only LONGs with capitulation triplet × IV crushed × haven OK survive — and today none did (WHR/EPAM/TSCO are falling knives, not capitulation, MA20 collapsing).
· Filter 2 (sector): tech sectors (XLK +14.5 RS) are at top of rotation. Historically when leading sectors get this stretched in EUPHORIA macro, rotation away begins within 4-8 weeks. Mega-cap tech is the obvious blow-off candidate.
· Filter 6 (timing): chasing pumps (FLNC/INOD +85% gap) and catching falling knives (WHR -50% with MA20 collapsing) are both filtered out. What remains : top performers in zone of mean-reversion.

Methodology recap (7 filters cascaded).
1. Macro regime — EUPHORIA/RISK-OFF/RISK-ON drives bias preference.
2. Sector strength — RS 20d vs SPY, top/bottom 3 alignment.
3. Ticker quality — market cap > $2B, liquidity > $5M/day, anti-blow-off, anti-falling-knife.
4. Cross-screener confluence — minimum 3 screeners in the cockpit firing simultaneously.
5. Options layer — IV/HV ratio + OI-PCR + super-euphoria + smart-money flow.
6. Setup timing — anti-pump, anti-knife, reversal candle for LONG, topping pattern for SHORT.
6.5. Catalyst calendar — earnings DTE adjustments (skip event risk on LONG, straddle on IV ramp).
7. R:R minimum 2:1 — ATR-based stop/target, skip if R:R < 2.

Honest assessment. These 3 BLOW-OFF shorts are the highest-conviction setups the methodology produced today, but they are not risk-free. Mega-cap tech stops can extend 1-3 days even when the thesis is right — squeeze risk on these names is real. Defined-risk via puts (or put debit spread if your broker allows) is preferred over equity short. Sizing should be 1-2% portfolio per name, not 5%. If you have only 1 to play, GOOGL has the cleanest setup (lowest conviction inversely = lower squeeze risk, Mother of Jaws thesis aligned, large mcap depth). INTC carries a higher squeeze risk because of the recent narrative momentum.
#1CSCO📉 BLOW-OFF SHORTconv 7.0/10
Blow-off top (sector winner in euphoria regime)
SideBLOW-OFF SHORTConviction7.0/10R:R2.0×SectorXLK (top 1, rotation candidate)
WHY NOW. Macro: EUPHORIA — xMarketTopMas EUPHORIA z=+3.09, VIX Spike tier 2. Sector: XLK (top 1, rotation candidate) — wave with you. 60d return: +51.3%, 252d: +51%. Trading at $118.21 (+0% from 52w high $118.21).

THESIS. Stock has rallied massively (60d return > +30%), RSI in extreme territory (>70), options pricing event (IV/HV > 1.2), retail FOMO confirmed, smart money starting to hedge. Sector at top of rotation = next phase is rotation away. Asymmetric short setup if regime confirms (EUPHORIA macro).

SCENARIOS.
· Bear case: reversal candle confirms, mean-reversion plays out -5 to -15% over 1-3 weeks.
· Base case: partial mean-reversion, trail stop or exit at -1.5×ATR profit.
· Bull case (squeeze): stop triggered, exit. Squeeze can extend 1-3 days; respect the stop.

LEVELS (equity). Entry: $118.21. Stop: $125.01. Target: $104.61. R:R: 2.0×.

HOW TO PLAY (real Polygon options chain).
· Options composite: 🟡 GO LIGHT 61/100 · ITM 2% Put $120 33DTE · $7.89 mid · BE $112.11 · target $16.21 (R/R 1.1×, P(ITM) 54.0%). Breakdown: IVR 72 (rich) · IV-HV -8.6pt (vega upside) · Skew -3.7pt (cheap puts) · ratio 0.90 (fair vs DD) · OI 552 (marginal · spread to confirm at open).
· RECOMMENDED · 33D PUT strike $120.00 (expiry 2026-06-18): premium $7.89 (6.7% of spot), IV 34%, OI 552, vol 1,222 (✓ liquid), P(ITM) ~54%.
·   → Breakeven $112.11. If target $104.61 hit → payoff $7.50 (real R:R 0.95×). Max loss = premium $7.89 per contract.

ACTIONABLE VERDICT.
· ❌ Options R:R 0.95× — SKIP CE TRADE. Le marché options price déjà tout le move (IV 34%, premium 6.7% spot). Pas de puts ici — le R:R ne paie pas. Alternatives valables : (1) attendre IV crush avant d'entrer, (2) SELL PREMIUM au lieu d'acheter (cash-secured put -8% strike pour collecter prime), (3) skip ce ticker, regarder le LONG capitulation suivant.

WHAT COULD GO WRONG.
· Stop discipline: $125.01. Don't move it.
· Earnings risk: no immediate event
· Squeeze risk: stops up 1-3 days even when thesis is right.
· Cross-check chart 6-12 months and earnings calendar before entering.

MY TAKE. Highest-conviction trade today. 4 screeners aligned, R:R 2.0×, sector with you, options layer neutral. I'd take this blow-off short with reduced sizing (regime adverse).

· 💰 Premium-sell idea (EUPHORIA edge): instead of buying puts, sell cash-secured puts at $221 strike (-8% from spot, ~30 DTE) to collect 56% IV premium. If assigned, you own the stock at a discount; if not, keep the premium. Bullish-bias trade exploiting expensive IV.

VaR $-658 (2.5% NAV) Concentration alert: CORZ 260618C00028000 51%. Net beta 0.57 — OK 0.3-0.7 (NORMAL regime).
How to read
VaR 95% 1d = the 5th-percentile P&L from 10k Monte Carlo simulations using 60d historical returns and correlations. CVaR (Expected Shortfall) = mean of the worst 5% scenarios — the true tail loss. Net beta = (long dollar-beta − short dollar-beta) / total NAV; target 0.3-0.7 in NORMAL regime. Concentration alert fires when any single position > 10% of book. Stress scenarios use beta-to-SPY for stocks; options proxied at delta 0.5.
02
Macro play · 5-step rotation methodology
Rotation play — long laggards (equity + calls) VALID
🔄 Rotation play methodology — long laggards, no shorts, no options-sell
5-step rotation methodology
LeaderXLKDecorr laggards7Quality picks63
The methodology (5 steps).

Step 1 — Identify decorrelated laggards. Compute 30-day correlation of each sector ETF to the leader (XLK). Keep sectors with correlation < +0.4 (decoupled) AND RS 20d < 0 (laggard vs SPY). Don't bet on a sector unless it's BOTH decoupled AND already lagging — otherwise you're just adding correlated risk.

Step 2 — Filter quality tickers in those sectors. For each decorr-laggard sector, pull the SP500 names. Apply hard filters: market cap > $5B, price > 92% of MA200 (not broken), individual 30d correlation to leader < +0.4, RSI 35-65 (balanced — not capitulation, not euphoric).

Step 3 — Confirm momentum. Require positive relative strength: ticker's 5-day return − SPY's 5-day return > -3% (i.e., not still falling vs market). This filters out laggards that are still getting weaker (no edge in catching falling knife). We want sectors that have started showing relative strength.

Step 4 — Entry timing. Three valid entry triggers:
(a) Pullback to MA20 in confirmed sector uptrend
(b) Breakout above 20-day high on rising volume
(c) Base-building 4+ weeks then breakout
Don't enter a name just because it's decorrelated — wait for the price action to confirm.

Step 5 — Position sizing & exit. Sizing 2-3% portfolio per ticker. Stop = -2.5×ATR(14) or MA50 break. Target 1 = +15% (typical sector rotation gain over 3 months). Target 2 = MA200 reclaim or +25%. Horizon 3-6 months. Trail stop after +10% to protect gains. Sector rotation plays are slow — don't day-trade them, don't double-up on a single name.
Decorrelated sectors today
XLU-0.06XLP-0.05XLV+0.03XLRE+0.20
Decorrelated laggards ranked by correlation to XLK:

· XLU · 30d corr to XLK = -0.06 (⭐ INVERSELY CORRELATED) · RS 20d -9.0 · 60d return -7.1% · 252d -46.8%
· XLP · 30d corr to XLK = -0.05 (⭐ INVERSELY CORRELATED) · RS 20d -1.4 · 60d return -5.7% · 252d +2.8%
· XLV · 30d corr to XLK = +0.03 (✓ low correlation) · RS 20d -6.6 · 60d return -8.1% · 252d +8.0%
· XLRE · 30d corr to XLK = +0.20 (✓ low correlation) · RS 20d -6.9 · 60d return -1.1% · 252d +2.7%
· XLF · 30d corr to XLK = +0.25 (⚠ moderately correlated) · RS 20d -6.6 · 60d return +0.2% · 252d -1.0%

Reading: sectors with negative or zero 30d correlation to the leader are the cleanest rotation candidates. They've underperformed (RS 20d negative) AND they're decoupled (correlation low). When the leader rolls, money rotates here first.

Historical playbook for XLK EUPHORIA tops:
· 2000 dot-com top: XLU outperformed by +50pp over 6 months. XLP +25pp.
· 2007 financial top: XLP +25pp, XLU +20pp, GLD +25%, TLT +18%.
· 2018 Q4: XLU +10%, XLP +5%, TLT +6% while QQQ -23%.
· 2021 ARKK top: VLUE +30pp vs VUG over 12 months. XLE +50% in 2022.
· 2022 mega-cap bear: XLE +50%, XLP -1% (relative +30pp).

Pattern (5/5 episodes): defensives (XLP, XLU) + bonds (TLT) outperformed in 100% of cases post tech-EUPHORIA. The exact magnitude varies by cycle. Energy (XLE) is more cyclic — depends on the commodity regime.

Pair-trade idea: long XLU / short XLK
PairXLU/XLKZ-score-3.25
XLU/XLK ratio currently 0.249, 1y mean 0.316, z-score -3.25σ.

Ratio at extreme low — historically when this z reaches -2σ or below, mean-reversion has worked 80%+ of the time over 3-6 months. Direct rotation play without single-stock selection risk.

Sizing: equal dollar long/short, 5-8% gross book. Stop if z reaches +1σ (rotation thesis invalidated). Trail target as ratio mean-reverts.

Risk: rotation can take 4-12 weeks to materialize. Don't sell the pair on first wobble. Backtest pairs trading on sector ratios = average Sharpe 0.6-0.8 over 10y, hit rate 65-70% on 3-6 month horizons.

Top blow-off candidate today: MU (score 13, target ~$640.96 (DD20d -11.6%)).

5 ticker(s) déclenchent au moins UN signal backtesté Bonferroni-validé (25y, 50,109 obs, p<0.001). 1 cumulent ≥3 points = high conviction.

Méthodologie : les signaux backtest-validés mesurent le max drawdown sur 20j (et non le forward return moyen — masqué par les rebounds en bull market). Les heuristiques académiques (Greenwood-Shleifer-You, Edwards-Magee, gap, island, LPPLS) restent affichées pour contexte mais ne survivent pas seules à Bonferroni — elles confirment seulement.
How to read
Signaux backtest-validés (25 ans, 91 tickers, 50,109 observations, p<0.001) :
• Two-red parabolic (poids 3) — 2 jours rouges après parabolic. DD 20d -11.55%, lift +20pp, N=302.
• Stoch cross<80 + parabolic (poids 2) — DD 20d -9.65%, N=148.
• Rally + red on volume (poids 2) — rally 10%+ puis red day. DD 20d -7.23%, N=93.
• Shooting star / BB fail / Bearish engulf (poids 1) — DD 20d -3 à -5%.

Decision options = composite 0-100 multi-facteurs (IV Rank · IV-HV · term struct · skew 25Δ · ratio implied/DD · liquidité). Score ≥70 + liquidité OK → 🟢 GO ATM Put. Score 50-70 → 🟡 GO LIGHT OTM 25Δ. <50 ou liquidité KO → 🔴 NO GO + raison.

Composite global REJECT isolément (forward return moyen biaisé bull). Signaux individuels VALID sur max-DD metric.

🟢 Top 5 BTFD candidates (strong leader + healthy pullback) :
  • OKTA (Cloud / SaaS) · spot $82.77 · RS +10.5pp · RSI 64 · ret 5d -1.3% · +8.0% vs MA50 · -34.1% off 52w high
  • SNPS (AI Supply Chain) · spot $502.42 · RS +7.7pp · RSI 53 · ret 5d -2.7% · +13.1% vs MA50 · -22.1% off 52w high
  • CDNS (AI Supply Chain) · spot $347.24 · RS +7.6pp · RSI 58 · ret 5d -4.3% · +12.8% vs MA50 · -7.0% off 52w high

How to read
Each theme = curated basket 4-9 mega/large caps. Members ranked by RS 20d (=ret_20 − SPY ret_20). Leaders = top 3 by RS, laggards = bottom 2.
Verdict tiers:
• EXTENDED (red) — avg RSI ≥72 + ret 20d >15%. Mean-reversion risk.
• STRONG (red) — avg RSI ≥65. Momentum intact.
• NEUTRAL — RSI 45-65.
• WEAK (green) — avg RSI ≤45.
• OVERSOLD (green) — RSI ≤35 + ret <-8%. Capitulation BTFD setup.

BTFD candidate criteria (column 'Best dip') :
  ✓ RS > +3pp vs SPY (= leader quality)
  ✓ RSI 40-65 (= not overbought)
  ✓ ret 5d entre -6% et +2% (= consolidation/pullback récent)
  ✓ above MA50 (= uptrend intact)
  ✓ >3% off 52w high (= pas en blow-off)

Universe est narratif (AI Megacaps, Nuclear, Defense, etc.) ≠ GICS sectors. Captures cross-sector themes (AI Supply Chain spans semis + software).

Historical rebound by theme after SPY -5% drawdowns
Si le marché corrige -5%, qu'acheter ? Playbook historique 4 ans NEW
📅 EOD 2026-05-16 · 14 SPY drawdown troughs analyzed (2021-10 → 2026-03) · SPY median rebound: +6.23% (30d) / +5.26% (60d) · medians used (robust to outliers SMR/OKLO/RGTI)

EnergyHEDGE / DIVERGES-0.37%-6.59pp1.85%-3.41pp84
Bonds long (TLT)HEDGE / DIVERGES-0.46%-6.69pp-4.43%-9.69pp14

Best rebound theme historically: Cybersecurity (median +9.0% on 30d, +2.8pp vs SPY).
Worst rebound theme: Quantum / Frontier (median -1.4%, -7.6pp vs SPY).

Si SPY corrige -5% : historiquement les meilleurs rebounds 30j sont dans la tech speculative (AI Megacaps, AI Supply Chain, Quantum) — high beta qui rebondit + fort que le marché. Les hedges (Bonds long, Gold) sont neutres à ce horizon.

Médianes utilisées (pas moyennes) pour éviter outliers extrêmes (SMR/OKLO/RGTI ont fait +200-400% post certains crashs).
How to read
Détection des troughs SPY -5% : prix ≤ -5% du rolling 20d high, puis cherche le local minimum dans les 10 jours suivants. 30 jours d'écart minimum entre 2 troughs (pas de double comptage).

Pour chaque trough, on calcule le forward return de chaque ticker du thème à 30j et 60j. On agrège par médiane (= rebound typique d'un nom moyen du thème, pas la moyenne tirée par les outliers).

Lift vs SPY = (médiane theme − médiane SPY). Lift >+4pp = STRONG REBOUND, 1-4pp = DECENT, -1 à +1 = NEUTRAL, -3 à -1 = LAGS, <-3pp = HEDGE/DIVERGES.

Lecture pratique : si SPY perd -5% demain, attendre 5-10j que le bottom se forme, puis allouer en priorité aux thèmes STRONG REBOUND (high beta tech). Compléter avec hedges (Bonds, Gold) si le drawdown s'approfondit -10%+.

Regime: CONCENTRATED — late-cycle (dispersion 19.2pp).
Leaders (RS ≥ +5pp): XLK.
Oversold (RS ≤ -10pp): none.

Une dispersion ≥ 25pp = warning fin de cycle (oct 2007, déc 1999, janv 2022 ont eu des lectures similaires). Quand un seul secteur porte le marché, la correction est violente et les laggers oversold (-10pp+) sont les rebound candidates prioritaires une fois la rotation déclenchée.
How to read
RS 20d = ret 20d du secteur − ret 20d SPY. Mesure le leadership relatif.
Verdicts:
• LEADER (red, RS ≥ +8pp) — domine le marché. Risk = blow-off / mean-reversion.
• STRONG (red, +2 à +8pp) — surperforme.
• INLINE — RS -2 à +2pp, marche avec le marché.
• LAGGING (green, -7 à -2pp) — sous-performe légèrement.
• WEAK (green, -12 à -7pp) — décroche.
• OVERSOLD (green dark, ≤ -12pp) — décrochement extrême, mean-revert candidate.

Dispersion 20d = RS du leader − RS du laggard. <10pp = broad rally, 10-18pp = healthy trending, 18-25pp = late-cycle, ≥25pp = end-cycle warning.

Composite breadth score: 33/100 — VERY WEAK · regime RISK-OFF (was 55/100 1W ago, -21.8pts).

Indicators that flipped this week:
  • NH/NL Net: 🟢 → 🔴 (now -5.00, was 6.00)
  • HL Index 10d: 🟢 → 🔴 (now 39.13, was 61.54)
  • % > 50 SMA: 🟢 → 🔴 (now 47.11, was 51.65)
  • Up/Dn Ratio: 🟢 → 🔴 (now 0.39, was 2.36)
  • TRIN: 🟢 → 🟡 (now 1.06, was 0.31)


Today's session: 70 advancers vs 172 decliners. A/D ratio 0.41. Roughly 2.5 stocks declined for every advance. Selling broad and persistent.

Volume: $115.79B up vs $300.70B down (ratio 0.39). For every dollar flowing in, 2.6 dollars are flowing out. TRIN 1.06 (sellers in control).

McClellan: Oscillator -11.3, Summation -82. Both negative — momentum and structural damage agree.

Highs/Lows: 9 new 52w highs vs 14 new 52w lows (HL Index 39.1%). More breakdowns than breakouts — narrow leadership reality.

Participation: 47.1% above 50-day MA · 52.9% above 200-day. Most of the market is structurally still in uptrend.

Zweig 10d breadth thrust: 40.8%. Thrust signal fires above 61.5% — not even close.

Sectors: 6/11 in uptrend (% above MA50 ≥50). Up: XLE, XLK, XLRE, XLP, XLF, XLB. Lag: XLU, XLY, XLV, XLC, XLI.

Action: Cash 40-50% · no new longs > 1.5% · hedge or sideline
How to read
Le composite breadth score 0-100 agrège 10 sous-indicateurs avec poids : A/D Ratio (13.5%) · A/D Trend (13.5%) · NH/NL (9%) · HL Index (9%) · % above MA50 (13.5%) · McClellan Osc (9%) · McClellan Sum (9%) · TRIN (9%) · Volume ratio (4.6%) · Sector breadth (10%).

Verdict tiers :
• ≥65 STRONG (RISK-ON, normal sizing)
• 50-65 DECENT (NEUTRAL, selective)
• 35-50 WEAK (CAUTION, trim + hedge)
• 20-35 VERY WEAK (RISK-OFF, cash 40-50%)
• <20 CAPITULATION (BTFD setup, scale-in starts)

Le pattern critique : oscillator qui rebondit + summation qui chute = correction non terminée. La momentum se reprend court terme mais les damages cumulatifs continuent.

IndexCurrentChange 1DPrev Chg30D RangePctileStatus

SKEW145.77+4.6%-1.5%135.4 – 156.948%HIGH
——————
KEY RATIOS
VIX/VIX6M0.793——> 1.0 = backwardation = fear—🟢
VIX/VIX3M0.863——inverted = immediate fear—🟢
VIX9D/VIX0.888——short-term calm vs spot—🟢
VXN/VIX1.374——tech vs broad — normal ~1.05—🟡
VVIX/VIX5.043——vol of vol——
——————
CORRELATIONS
SPX vs VIX (7d)-59.5%——expected ~ -0.7—🟢
SPX vs VVIX (7d)+14.3%——diverge = warning—🔴
SPX vs Gold (50d)+58.5%——high = complacency—🔴
——————
MASTER SIGNAL SCORE5/14 → 3.6/10——verdict NORMAL—NORMAL
Volatility regime: NORMAL (master signal 3.6/10) · spike probability LOW.

VIX at 18.43 (percentile 30d: 17%). Calm 17-22 — normal range.

Term structure: VIX/VIX6M = 0.793. Contango (normal) — front below back, no immediate stress priced.

SKEW at 145.8. Above 145 = institutional tail hedging is bid up. Significant in confluence with VIX backwardation.

SPX/VVIX correlation 7d positive (+0.14) = vol-of-vol diverging from index direction. Institutions hedging behind a bid market — warning sign in confluence with elevated SKEW.

Action: vol regime favorable for selling premium (covered calls, put selling on quality names). Long premium positions face theta drag without spike.
How to read
9 vol indices couvrent 30j (VIX9D/VIX) — 6m (VIX6M) — sectoriel (VXN tech, OVX oil, GVZ gold). VVIX = vol of VIX (signal d'instabilité). SKEW = pricing tail risk OTM puts.

Master signal 0-10 agrège VIX level + 1D change + term structure + VVIX percentile + SKEW + cross-asset.
• ≥7 HIGH (spike imminent ou en cours)
• 5-7 ELEVATED (caution, hedge selectivement)
• 3-5 NORMAL
• <3 LOW (vol crushed, sell premium OK)

Term structure est le tell #1 : VIX/VIX6M > 1.05 = backwardation = fear pricé immédiatement. Historiquement précède 60-70% des VIX spikes à 60j (Bonferroni-validé).

UUP · DXY proxy0.54%1.17%1.57%1.31%1.46%0.33%2.40%-1.45%2.43%UPTREND ↑DECORREL+nan

FX environment: DOLLAR STRENGTHENING (UUP +1.50% on 1 month).

  • Top movers 1M: UUP (+1.5%), FXA (+1.4%), FXE (-1.4%)
  • Macro read: Dollar strong on 1M (+1.50%). USD strength historically weighs on risk assets (EM equities, commodities, crypto). NEG CORR pairs are structural hedges; a sudden break in those correlations = major reversal signal.
  • Action: Hedge equities via TLT or Gold (GLD). Light EM exposure. Watch GVZ to confirm gold safe-haven flight.
How to read

FX exposure via ETF proxies: FXE = EUR, FXB = GBP, FXY = JPY (inverted), FXF = CHF (inverted), FXA = AUD, FXC = CAD (inverted), UUP = DXY-like (USD index).

  • Phase — UPTREND (1M and 3M positive), DOWNTREND, RANGE-BOUND, REVERSAL.
  • SPY 60d correlation signal — POS CORR (>+0.2) = comoves with stocks (typical EUR, GBP, AUD); NEG CORR (<-0.2) = natural hedge (typical USDJPY, USDCHF in risk-off).

Macro patterns:

  • USD strong + EM weak = classical risk-off
  • USD weak + commodities strong = risk-on / reflation trade
  • JPY/CHF strength = safe-haven flight, VIX spike alert
  • AUD/NZD weakness = commodity slowdown signal

Note: ETF proxies drift vs spot FX (fees, hedging cost). Directional signal valid, absolute value approximate.

90
G8 currencies equal-weighted index · D1 / W / M ranking · z-normalised · RISK-OFF Bonferroni-VALID 11y
FX MTF Strength — USD · EUR · GBP · JPY · CHF · CAD · AUD · NZD relative strength meter VALID
📅 As of 2026-05-16 · 356 bars cached · 8 G8 currencies × equal-weighted index vs the 7 others · z-score normalised on 252d rolling window
RankCcyD1 %W %M %D1 zW zM zComposite z
#1USD0.03%1.06%0.14%0.101.460.130.56
#2JPY0.03%-0.30%0.68%0.14-0.171.370.45
#3AUD0.03%0.69%1.49%-0.040.700.570.41
#4CHF0.03%0.17%0.44%0.040.230.380.22
#5CAD-0.18%0.51%-0.52%-0.721.04-0.60-0.09
#6EUR0.03%-0.29%-0.60%0.11-0.64-0.79-0.44
#7GBP0.03%-0.75%-0.50%0.07-1.51-0.57-0.67
#8NZD0.03%-1.08%-1.14%0.09-1.41-0.75-0.69
**Verdict : MIXED** — #1 USD (z=+0.56) · #8 NZD (z=-0.69). Top: USD (composite z=+0.56). Bottom: NZD (composite z=-0.69). Cross-asset reading : USD bid + JPY bid → risk-off, USD low + JPY low → risk-on, USD bid + JPY low → carry trade (risk-on financé en yen), USD low + JPY bid → JPY flight.
How to read
**Méthode** : pour chaque devise X du panier G8 (USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, CHF, CAD, AUD, NZD), on calcule un index equal-weighted = mean des log-returns log(X/Y) vs les 7 autres devises Y. Sur chaque timeframe (D1=1j, W=5j, M=21j), on cumule puis on normalise par std rolling 252j → z-score. Composite z = mean équipondérée des 3 z. Rank par composite décroissant (1 = devise la plus forte). **Backtest 11y (2015-2026, MCPT 5000× + Bonferroni n=15) — VALID** : RISK-OFF (USD+JPY both bid, N=203 events) → SPY excess return **+0.53%/5j** (p_bonf=0.027 ✅) et **+0.73%/10j** (p_bonf=0.036 ✅). Pattern contrarian (« buy the panic ») confirmé. **Walk-forward train 2015-2022 / test 2023-2026** : signal **s'améliore OOS** (test 5j +0.88% vs train +0.53%, test 10j +1.02% vs train +0.78%) — pas d'overfit. Tous les autres régimes (RISK_ON, CARRY_TRADE, JPY_FLIGHT, USD_BID_SOLO) REJECT à p_bonf < 0.05. **Usage** : RISK-OFF actif → ne pas shorter naïvement, attendre 5-10j pour le rebound technique (la peur FX est contrarian sur SPY). Cohérent avec BTFD / mean-reversion (BOTTOM screener, RSI Breadth CAPITULATION). Inspiré du thread @kerberos007 (Mar 26, 2020) « Multi-Time Frame FX Currency Relative Strength Meter ».
11
Recherche nuit autonome · 27 chantiers · walk-forward + block bootstrap + Sharpe NET costs
Combos confluence validés — Sharpe NET + régime VIX NEW
Walk-forward 3 fenêtres + block bootstrap CI 95% + Sharpe NET (coûts 0.21%). Régime actuel : NORMAL (VIX 17.97). 🟢=aligned régime préféré ; 🔴=misaligned (sizing réduit conseillé).
ComboTIERRégimeSharpe NETCI 95% NETNWR NETMean fwd-20d
KERBEROS_RSI × BLOWOFF🔵 PRAG🔴 NEG4.46[3.68, 5.70]9276%+9.93%
KERBEROS_RSI × UNUSUAL🔵 PRAG🟢 OK (Sh +1.8)4.45[2.42, 6.95]6275%+15.79%
BOTTOM × KERBEROS_RSI × BLOWOFF🟡 PAPER🔴 NEG4.41[3.32, 6.43]4877%+12.20%
PULLBACK × BOTTOM × KERBEROS_RSI × BLOWOFF🔵 PRAG🔴 NEG4.39[3.12, 6.69]7078%+10.10%
VSA × PULLBACK × BLOWOFF × BREAKOUT🔵 PRAG🟢 OK (Sh +3.7)4.06[2.03, 6.16]6873%+15.39%
BOTTOM × KERBEROS_RSI × UNUSUAL🔵 PRAG🟢 OK (Sh +1.4)3.67[1.33, 6.13]6170%+14.27%
PULLBACK × BOTTOM × KERBEROS_RSI🔵 PRAG🟢 OK (Sh +1.7)3.57[3.10, 4.09]1,57473%+5.48%
VSA × BOTTOM × KERBEROS_RSI🔵 PRAG🟢 OK (Sh +3.2)3.52[2.87, 4.16]65569%+8.18%
VSA × BLOWOFF × BREAKOUT🔵 PRAG🟢 OK (Sh +1.2)3.49[1.12, 5.59]7369%+13.40%
3,196 combos testés, 31 Bonferroni-valides. 0 TIER 1 PROD, 8 TIER 2 PRAGMATIC, 1 TIER 3 PAPER. Winner statistique : PULLBACK × BOTTOM × KERBEROS_RSI (N=1,574, Sharpe NET 3.57, CI [3.10, 4.09]). VIX 17.97 → régime NORMAL. Polygon scan 1,032 tickers (30j lookback) → 7 tickers cumulent ≥3 combos : GLNG, CMS, SM, WEC, QCOM, MTN, DPZ. 594 signaux actifs (7j lookback) au 2026-05-11. Top combo actif : VSA × PULLBACK × BLOWOFF × BREAKOUT avec 2 tickers (KC, OBE). ⚠ Sharpe 4+ in-sample probablement gonflé par régime 2025-2026 ; décay broad univers 0.81 → 0.29. Sizing conservateur (cap 3% Kelly) pour TIER 2/3.
How to read
Chaque ligne = un combo (paire/triplet/quadruple de screeners) qui déclenche en même temps (±1 jour) sur un même ticker. TIER classification : PROD = robuste 3/3 fenêtres ; PRAGMATIC = CI 95% NET solide même si train sparse ; PAPER = signal directionnel à valider. Sharpe NET inclut 10 bps slippage × 2 (entry + exit) + 1 bp commission. Le scan Polygon parcourt les tickers récents (lookback 30j) et identifie ceux qui matchent chaque combo. Régime indique si le régime VIX préféré du combo est aligned avec le présent.

Liste des 25 tickers liquides (>=$50M/jour) actifs sur ≥1 top combo dans les 30 derniers jours, filtrés position 52w < 95%. **6 ULTRA** (≥4 combos simultanés), **1 HIGH** (3 combos), reste medium/low. VIX 17.97 → régime NORMAL. Conviction badges : 🔥 ULTRA (≥4 combos), 💎 HIGH (3), ✨ MED (2), · LOW (1). Régime 🟢 OK = au moins un combo a Sharpe >1 en régime actuel ; 🔴 = tous misaligned. Sizing recommandé : ULTRA cap 3% Kelly, HIGH cap 2%, MED cap 1%, LOW paper-trade only.
How to read
Chaque ligne = un ticker qui a déclenché ≥1 top combo dans les 7 derniers jours sur l'univers liquide (>=$50M/jour avg volume). **Conviction** = nombre de combos simultanés (plus c'est haut, plus le signal est robuste). **Persistence 30j** = nombre de jours d'apparition dans les 30j passés (≥5j = alpha validé sur BOTTOM, +12% WR vs solo apparition). 🔄 HIGH = ≥10j, ↻ MED = 5-10j, · LOW = 2-4j, ○ NONE <2j. **Pos 52w** : 0% = bottom 52w, 100% = high. Cherche bas pour mean-reversion. **Régime** 🟢 OK = au moins un combo a Sharpe >1 dans VIX actuel ; 🔴 = tous misaligned. **Best Sharpe** = meilleur Sharpe parmi les combos green sur ce ticker. **Sizing recommandé** : ULTRA cap 3% Kelly, HIGH cap 2%, MED cap 1%, LOW paper-trade only.
13
Daily top trades · 4 macro filters applied (market regime, crash risk, 52-week position, earnings proximity)
Today's top picks — filtered by market state NEW
Which top picks to actually take TODAY given the macro context
🎯 Today's top 5 picks (after macro filter applied)

→ Plein écran

📊 Does the filter actually work? — A/B backtest validation

→ Plein écran

Takes each daily screener pick and asks 4 questions before greenlighting it: (1) Is the macro regime favorable for this screener type? (2) Are we in a crash zone? (3) Is the stock at a blow-off top or a legit BTFD? (4) Is there an earnings catalyst too close? Backtest: **+0.50 Sharpe on 10d horizon** (N=146 picks). In crash zones: **+11.4 percentage points win rate** — the filter saves you from buying tops at the worst moment.
How to read
**Multipliers** above 1.0 = favorable boost, below 1.0 = penalty. **Regime ×**: BULL_BROAD favors momentum (PULLBACK / BREAKOUT), BEAR favors mean-reversion (BOTTOM). **Crash ×**: 0.65 on LONG (filter out), 1.15 on SHORT (tailwind). **Pos 52w ×**: blow-off (>95% of 52-week high) → 0.40 LONG, legit BTFD (<30% range + negative 60d return) → 1.25. **Earnings ×**: 3 days before → 0.60 (binary risk), 10-30 days after → 1.10 (post-earnings drift window). **Kill-switch LONG**: crash zone + blow-off → score capped at 35. Refresh: `python3.11 generate_conviction_shortlist.py && python3.11 automation/generate_conviction_backtest_card.py`

5 macro composites at a glance — drill into Reference for each detail.
Each brick = one macro top-warning composite. Green/yellow/red color follows each composite's individual tier. When 3+ composites flash red simultaneously → trim long exposure aggressively.
How to read
**xMarketTopMas** = SPHB/IEF z-score 5y (risk-on vs low-vol). **Max Optimism** = 4-brick stack. **VIX Spike** = 4-tier confluence detector. **TraderMonty** = 5-signal sentiment. **SKEW** = tail risk pricing. Each is Bonferroni-validated separately. Confluence ≥3 firing = structural alert.
83
Early-warning breadth signals · Hindenburg + Zweig Breadth Thrust + Russell breadth
Breadth deterioration grid (3 signals merged) NEW
⚪
Hindenburg Omen — —
NH/NL extremes + McClellan + breadth
⚪
Zweig Breadth Thrust — —
% issues advancing rolling 10-day
⚪
Russell breadth — —
% Russell 3000 above MA200
Breadth deterioration warning grid (3 independent signals).
These 3 signals fire under different conditions (Hindenburg = NH/NL extremes, Zweig = breadth thrust momentum, Russell = mean reversion). When 2+ fire, the rally is narrowing.
How to read
Single signal = noise. Two signals firing simultaneously = early warning. Three firing = trim aggressively.
84
Options flow sentiment · IV/HV anomalies + IV crushed + super-euphoria + heavy puts
Options sentiment grid (4 anomaly scans merged) NEW
⚪
IV/HV anomalies — 20
Cheap or rich vs realized
⚪
IV crushed — 40
IV/HV < 0.85, buyer's market
⚪
Super-euphoria calls — 40
Extreme bullish call volume
⚪
Heavy put volume — 9
Vol/OI ≥ 0.20 institutional hedge
Options sentiment grid — 4 anomaly scans at a glance.
Combined options-flow sentiment. Cheap IV/HV = buyer's edge. Euphoria calls = topping signal. Heavy puts = institutional hedge or short setup.
How to read
Tickers in **super-euphoria** today are crowded long bets — often top within 5 days. Tickers in **heavy put volume** are either hedged longs or short positioning. Cross-reference with screeners.
85
RSI extremes · oversold (SP500 + TOP3K) + euphoria (SP500), 3-in-1 grid
RSI extremes — oversold & euphoria (3-in-1) NEW
⚪
Oversold S&P 500 — 30
RSI14 < 30 (BTFD candidates)
⚪
Oversold TOP 3000 — 30
Wider universe, includes small/mid caps
⚪
Euphoria S&P 500 — 30
RSI14 > 70 (short candidates)
RSI extremes grid — oversold (BTFD) and euphoria (short) scans.
Count balance matters: many oversold + few euphoria = bottom forming. Reverse = topping.
How to read
Click into individual scans (Reference tier) for ticker-level detail.
86
Capitulation candidates · SP500 + TOP3K merged (RSI<30 + DD>20% + vol surge)
Capitulation triplet (SP500 + TOP3K merged) NEW
⚪
Capitulation S&P 500 — 30
RSI<30 + DD>20% + vol surge
⚪
Capitulation TOP 3000 — 30
Wider universe
Capitulation candidates — oversold + heavy selling + volume.
Strongest BTFD candidates: tickers in BOTH SP500 and TOP3K capitulation lists.
How to read
Triple signal = RSI < 30 AND drawdown ≥ 20% from 52w high AND volume > 1.5× average.
87
Breadth composite score · SP500 + Polygon FULL (same logic, 2 universes)
Market breadth — SP500 vs Polygon FULL (merged) NEW
⚪
Breadth S&P 500 — —/100
—
⚪
Breadth Polygon FULL (~5k tickers) — —/100
—
Market breadth composite — same logic, 2 universes.
SP500 = large caps narrative. Polygon FULL = mid+small caps real participation. Divergence (SP500 high, Polygon low) = narrow rally, distribution risk.
How to read
Both above 70 = healthy broad rally. SP500 high + Polygon below 50 = late-cycle narrow leadership.

<span style="color:#888;">· Mild</span>1.0%KHC23.96+1.35%<span style="color:#2a8a2a;font-weight:700;">Call Surge</span>3.7x0.7x10-0.131.0x+0.0%
<span style="color:#888;">· Mild</span>1.0%W66.26+0.09%<span style="color:#2a8a2a;font-weight:700;">Call Surge</span>3.6x0.8x10+0.001.0x+0.0%
<span style="color:#888;">· Mild</span>1.0%EXK10.03-1.18%<span style="color:#a73a1f;font-weight:700;">Put Surge</span>2.1x4.1x9+0.001.0x+0.0%
<span style="color:#888;">· Mild</span>1.0%AI9.87+3.03%<span style="color:#2a8a2a;font-weight:700;">Call Surge</span>3.7x1.5x9+0.001.0x+0.0%
<span style="color:#888;">· Mild</span>1.0%BIDU141.05+0.84%<span style="color:#2a8a2a;font-weight:700;">Call Surge</span>3.0x1.6x9+0.001.0x+0.0%
<span style="color:#888;">· Mild</span>1.0%RKT15.69+10.88%<span style="color:#2a8a2a;font-weight:700;">Call Surge</span>3.8x2.1x9+0.001.0x+0.0%
TMAD-style options flow classifier inspired by @AlessioTMAD (tmad.app). Classification daily sur ~481 SP500-quality + ETFs liquides. **Backtest 2y, 269,688 records, SPY-excess (alpha-pure) — 4 signaux Bonferroni VALID** (p<0.0001) : Put Surge 5d +1.53%, Call Surge 40d +10.16%, Put Fade 5d +1.02%, Call Fade 5d +0.54%. **Sweep par intensité (mai 2026)** : l'edge est 2-4× plus gros sur les bucket Extreme/Insane. Call Surge Extreme (×10-20) → +28.30% alpha 40j ; Insane (×20+) → Sharpe 10j 0.90 + WR 58%. Mild ×3-5 dilue : ne pas sizer pareil.
How to read
**Lecture par Tier (intensité du ratio vs MA20)** : 🔥 Insane (≥20×) = signal rare, edge max, **size 3% book**. ⚡ Extreme (10-20×) = haute conviction, **size 2.5% book**. 💪 Strong (5-10×) = solide, **size 1.75% book**. · Mild (3-5×) = bruit majoritaire, **size 1% ou skip**. **Lecture par signal** : Call Surge → BUY trend, hold 40j (calls 60-75 DTE). Put Surge → BUY contrarian capitulation, hold 5-10j. Call/Put Fade Extreme (ratio ≤ 0.1) → filtre confluence, alpha 40j +22-26%. WR reste 47-58% (asymétrique : magnitudes gagnantes > perdantes). IV z = informationnel only (iv_history coverage trop limité pour filtrer). Refresh : `python3.11 tmad_screener.py` (cron VPS 22:35 CEST).
01
Kerberos macro · Composite
xMarketTopMas — SPHB/IEF z-score 5y VALID
3.09 EUPHORIA
SPHB/IEF ratio = 1.477 · z-score 5y: +3.09 · as of 2026-05-15
Risk-on at extremes. Backtest signal: SPY -5.4% expected at 120 days, hit rate 88% on past crashes. Trim winners.
How to read
Ratio of SPHB (high beta) to IEF (intermediate Treasuries), z-score on 5-year window. Bonferroni-validated 12/16 tests. Euphoria z>+2σ for ≥10 days warns 7/8 historical crashes.
02
Kerberos macro · 4-bricks composite
Max Optimism Stack VALID
⚪
GEX
WGEX SPY = +0.55B$ — NEUTRAL
🟢
PCR
Total Vol-PCR = 0.452 (COMPLACENT) — pctile 25.5% sur 47 obs
⚪
XLY_WMT
Historique insuffisant (3 days)
⚪
NYSE_SI
Percentile 100% sur 0.5y — EXTREME_HIGH
1/3 OFF
Max Optimism — 1/3 briques actives (seuil 3)
How to read
4 bricks: GEX (dealers long gamma), Equity-PCR (vol_pcr complacent <0.8), XLY/WMT z-score, NYSE Short Interest decile. Buffer 3-day hard cliff. Haven filter: GLD mom60≥-2% OR HYG/TLT mom30≤+2%.
03
Kerberos vol · 4-tier confluence
VIX Spike Detector VALID
2.00 MEDIUM (BACKWARDATION)
Active: SKEW, BACKWARDATION · VIX=18.4 · VIX3M/VIX=1.159 · P(VIX>25 @ 60d)=69%
MEDIUM CONVICTION — VIX>25 within 120d very likely. Trim short-vol exposure
How to read
Confluence of 3 sub-signals: SKEW Tail Risk (z-1y > 1.5 OR SKEW > 140), VIX3M/VIX backwardation (>1.05), VIX-RV adaptive zone. Kalman smoother (3-day persistence). Bonferroni-validated, p_bonf < 0.05 each sub-signal.
04
Kerberos sentiment · 5-signal
TraderMonty Composite MARGINAL
4.00 🔴 EUPHORIA
Composite +4/8 · 4 signals available (breadth, vix_spike, sector_pair, cnn_fng)
Considérer scale-in long VIX / SPY puts long-dated. Signal historique TraderMonty de top imminent.
How to read
5 sub-signals (breadth proxy, VIX regime, sector pairs XLY/XLP+SPY/MTUM, AAII Bull-Bear, BofA FMS). Equal-weight aggregator. 6/12 horizons Bonferroni-validated.
05
Kerberos vol · score 0-3
SKEW Tail Risk VALID
1.00 📊 Neutral-haut
SKEW=146 · z-1y=-0.05
Score 1/3. SKEW Tail Risk verdict: 📊 Neutral-haut. Backtest 11y: score≥2 → SPY -3.9% à 60j, -4.05% à 120j (p_bonf<0.0001).
How to read
Composite 0-3: +1 if SKEW≥140, +1 if z-1y≥+1.5σ, +1 if 20d divergence (SKEW+3% AND VIX-5%). Validated VALID Bonferroni 11y backtest.

25.64 LOW

07
Kerberos macro · 3 duels
Defensive Rotation (contrarian) OBSERVATION
1.00 1/3 active
XLP/XLY · XLU/XLK · SPLV/SPHB monthly+yearly checks
Composite 1/3. 1 duel défensif tier-up — surveillance mode.
How to read
3 duels défensif vs growth (Kerberos 2019). Score = min(monthly, yearly). Backtest verdict: signal CONTRARIAN — composite=3 → bottom is in, not warning of crash.
08
Kerberos breadth · PMO buy-zone (thread Apr 2021)
PMO Breadth — % SPY+QQQ stocks above PMO signal OBSERVATION
48.87 NEUTRE
260 of 532 S&P+QQQ stocks above PMO signal · as of 2026-05-14 · SPY 30d +14.1% · breadth 30d +7.9pp
Breadth à 46.6% en zone Neutre mais en chute claire (59 vers 46 en 7 jours, -5.4pp sur 30j pendant que SPX prend +14%), signature de distribution silencieuse même sans JAWS formel. VIX 18.87 et SPY +9% au-dessus SMA50 confirment le contexte complacent qui amplifie le risque d'air pocket si la dégradation continue. Pas d'action immédiate, mais surveiller le passage sous 40% et le déclenchement JAWS (breadth <55% déjà coché, manque -10pp sur 30j à -5.4 actuel).
How to read
PMO = StockCharts Price Momentum Oscillator (custom-smoothed RoC). Convert to breadth = % of top-540 US liquid stocks where PMO > its signal line. Kerberos007's 2021 thread maps 5 zones: ≤15% Capitulation (contrarian buy), 15-30% Fear, 30-70% Neutre (noise), 70-85% Greed, ≥85% Euphoria (contrarian top). JAWS warning fires when SPY 30d gains diverge from a breadth drop ≥10 points. MCPT-permutation 5000× backtest 2022-2026 (Bonferroni n=15): direction correct on all extremes, no individual tier passes Bonferroni alone — use as confirmation, not standalone trigger.
80
Kerberos BUY · PMO breadth × RSI oversold (validated 2026-05-15)
Kerberos BUY Confluence — Double Capitulation (Bonferroni VALID, 5/5 bottoms warned) VALID
25.00 ⚪ Inactive (no extreme)
PMO 48.9% · RSI oversold 2.9% · as of 2026-05-14
Neither breadth gauge in extreme zone. PMO 48.9%, RSI Oversold 2.9%. Watch for moves : PMO to ≤ 30% (currently +18.9pp away), RSI Oversold to ≥ 15% (currently -12.1pp away). Signal fires only when BOTH hit their thresholds simultaneously.
How to read
**Screener** : Confluence de deux breadth gauges Kerberos007 indépendants. Le signal fire UNIQUEMENT quand les deux extrêmes s'alignent simultanément. PMO Breadth (Apr 2021 thread) = % SPY+QQQ stocks avec PMO StockCharts au-dessus de sa ligne de signal — mesure le momentum profond, lent. RSI Oversold (Sep 2020 thread) = % SP500 stocks avec RSI(14) < 30 — mesure la panique tactique, rapide. Quand ces deux mesures hétérogènes basculent ensemble en zone extrême basse, c'est une signature de capitulation généralisée. **Backtest 2022-2026 MCPT 5000× Bonferroni n=8** : DOUBLE_CAPITULATION N=15, SPY +6.23pp à 60d (p_bonf=0.0064), +6.65pp à 120d (p_bonf=0.043). Solos REJECT Bonferroni. **Cross-check 5/5 drawdowns 2022-2026 warned** (Fed Q1 2022, Bear été 2022, Aug 2023, Yen-carry Aug 2024, Tariff Apr 2025). **Verdict** : signal contrarian BUY validé. À utiliser comme déclencheur d'achat SPY/QQQ horizon 60-120j. Limites : sample 3.5 ans, fenêtre étendue à backfill pour Bonferroni à N≥30.

0.00 CONTANGO

VIX term structure inversion. Backwardation (ratio < 1.0) capture stress aigu. Backtest VALID_STRONG p_bonf < 0.0001, SPY +7.23% a 60j post-trigger (vs +2.91% baseline). Pas un crash detector, un bottom-rebound 60-120j.

75
Kerberos extension · confluences · T1xHYG (NEW, le + fort: SPY +10.8%/60j) + T1xB2 + T1xJPY STRICT VALID · B2xJPY MARGINAL
Confluences (T1xHYG · T1xB2 · T1xJPY) VALID
⚪
T1 VXV/VIX backwardation
score 0/3 (CONTANGO)
⚪
B2 Micro/Large Rotation
score 0/3
⚪
S4 FX JPY Lead
score 0/3 (z +0.00)
⚪
credit HYG drawdown
score 0/3 (dd +0.00%)
Aucun signal actif
Backtest 2014-2026 (audit strict) : conf_t1_hyg (VXV/VIX backwardation x HYG drawdown) SPY +4.18% a 20j, +10.80% a 60j (+16.66% a 120j), p<0.0001, N=107, WF stable. conf_t1_b2 SPY +9.80% a 60j (+13.90% a 120j), N=73. conf_t1_jpy +9.81% a 60j, N=48. conf_b2_jpy MARGINAL (decay 40%). Quand un combo strict-valid co-apparait dans +-5j, trigger mean = +11-17% sur 60-120j (vs +3-6% baseline).
How to read
Signaux Kerberos extensions VALID + credit HYG drawdown. Confluence strict-valide = un combo T1xHYG / T1xB2 / T1xJPY actif (les 2 signaux dans +-5 jours). Le plus fort = T1xHYG (stress VIX + stress credit). A sizer 3-5% comme les combos magiques BOTTOM x SMART_FLOW. Bottom-rebound signals 60-120j, pas crash detectors. B2xJPY est MARGINAL (decay fort) — ne declenche pas de boost.

How to read
Composite anomaly score = |IV/HV − 1|×2 + |log10(OI-PCR)| + |log10(Vol-PCR)|×0.5 + |Change|/5 + |Corr30 − peer_mean|. Higher = more interesting.

How to read
Each ratio = numerator/denominator daily close. z-score = (current − 252d mean) / 252d std. |z|≥2σ = noteworthy, ≥3σ = extreme. Direction of z matters per ratio (e.g. SPHB/SPLV high z = risk-on; HYG/IEF low z = credit stress).

50 tickers où la vol réalisée a explosé en 5 jours. Top ramp: ASGN (+426%, IVXHL percentile 100). Pre-earnings, news, ou catalyst imminent. Implied vol typique suit la realisée — long premium si IVXHL bas.
How to read
Kerberos thread 'IVXHL surged also' : la volatilité implicite (IVXHL) ramp avant les events (earnings, FDA, deal). Notre proxy HV30 ramp = vol réalisée des 30 derniers jours vs des 30 jours il y a 5 jours. Si HV30 ramp +25% AND IVXHL percentile >60 = vol expansion confirmée. Combo straddle/strangle long si 7-14 jours avant event.

40 tickers IV/HV < 0.85 (premium sous-évalué vs réalisé). Most crushed: IMMP (IV/HV 0.00). Kerberos contrarian bullish setup : vol mean-reverte. Long premium attractive (long gamma, debit spreads, hedges quietly cheap).
How to read
IV crushed = IV30 < HV30 (le marché sous-paye la volatilité réalisée). Mean-reversion historique : ces tickers tendent à voir leur IV remonter dans 1-2 mois. Trade : long straddle/strangle si ratio < 0.70, ou simple long calls/puts pour exposition directionnelle peu chère.

40 tickers heavy call buying. Top: HSBC (call vol/OI 5.41). Kerberos 'super-euphoria call volume' : ratio >1.0 = FOMO retail, >0.5 = greed. Souvent contrarian top — IV expensive, vente premium intéressante (call credit spread).
How to read
Call Vol / Call OI : >1.0 = retail FOMO extrême (TSLA deep OTM calls type), >0.75 = euphoria, >0.5 = greed. Threads Kerberos : ce screener flag les contrarian tops (mass call buying souvent à la fin du squeeze). Mais aussi : large vol/OI peut indiquer début de squeeze légitime — cross-check avec Smart Flow OI delta.

40 tickers avec heavy put buying. Top: XLI (put vol/OI 12.01, OI-PCR 1.788). Kerberos 'smart money surge' : institutionnels hedgent ou shortent. Cross-check avec catalyseur (earnings, news, downgrade) avant interpréter.
How to read
Put Vol / Put OI : ratio élevé = volume spike côté put. Si OI-PCR aussi élevé = positioning bearish stable (smart money hedging structurel). Si Vol-PCR seul élevé sans OI shift = panic intraday (souvent contrarian buy après). Distinguer entre hedge institutionnel (durable) et panic (transient).

FANG+ basket +23.0% vs RSP -0.9% (60d) → spread +23.9pp. Concentration extrême maintenue — narrative AI/mega-cap toujours dominante. Watch divergence du basket vs RSP comme signal de craquement.
How to read
FANG+ = AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL, AMZN, META, NVDA, TSLA, NFLX, AVGO, AMD. RSP = equal-weight SP500. Spread basket vs RSP capture la concentration : >+10pp 60d = dominance mega-cap forte (à la 2020-2024), <-5pp 60d = broadening (rotation vers small caps). Concept Kerberos thread Oct 2020.

63 tickers cumulent ≥3 signaux Kerberos simultanément. Top: CVNA (score 4, RSI<30, DD>20%, vol>1.5σ, MA50 -10%). Confluence multi-signaux = vrai edge selon principe #1 Kerberos (solo = bruit). Tickers avec score 4-5 méritent attention setup approfondi (fundamentals + catalysts).
How to read
Confluence cross-section : pour chaque ticker on compte combien de signaux Kerberos basiques s'allument simultanément (RSI extremes, drawdown 52w, volume z-score, 52w high proximity, MA50 distance). Score ≥3 = vrai signal d'attention selon doctrine confluence Kerberos.

Max pain strike = price level where most option holders lose money at expiration. When spot is far from max pain, dealers may pin price toward it. Top divergence: TSLA (Δ -81.1%) — magnetism setup.
How to read
Max pain is a gravity point near expiration. Distance > +5% means upside pressure into expiry; < -5% means downside drift expected. Watch closer to expiration date for the effect.

40 tickers with IV pricing >1.3× realized — usually pre-event (earnings, FDA, deal). Top: SEM (IV/HV 11.53). Cross-check earnings calendar before considering long straddle (event must be within 21 days).
How to read
When implied volatility (IV) sits well above realized (HV) — typically because the market expects a near-term event. Long straddle attractive if event is 7-21 days away AND IV/HV > 1.5. Vol crush risk after event passes.

Kerberos breadth · Zweig signal
Zweig Breadth Thrust monitor NEW
📅 EOD 2026-05-16 · SP500 full · last 10 trading days · breadth thrust = <40% → >60% in 10d
Date% above 10d MA
2026-05-0450.40%
2026-05-0556.20%
2026-05-0664.00%
2026-05-0755.71%
2026-05-0856.11%
2026-05-1153.91%
2026-05-1253.91%
2026-05-1352.10%
2026-05-1453.31%
2026-05-1538.68%
Breadth: today 39% of stocks above 10d MA. Min over last 10d: 39%. No thrust active. Watch for sub-40% then jump above 60% within 10 days as buy signal.
How to read
Zweig Breadth Thrust is a rare bullish event: when % stocks above 10d MA goes from below 40% to above 60% inside 10 trading days, market is usually up significantly 6-12 months later. Last triggered: 2023, 2009, 1982.
163
Kerberos breadth · crash precursor
Hindenburg Omen monitor NEW
📅 EOD 2026-05-16 · SP500 full (496 tickers) · 52w high vs low extremes
MetricValue
% at 52w highs4.0%
% at 52w lows6.0%
Hindenburg OmenACTIVE ⚠
Sample size496
Top names at highAAPL, BIL, COST, CRWD, CSCO, DDOG, EBAY, FTNT
Top names at lowALNY, BDX, BKNG, BSX, CHTR, CMCSA, CVNA, DHR
🚨 HINDENBURG OMEN ACTIVE — rare crash-precursor signal.
How to read
Hindenburg Omen requires both ≥2.5% of stocks at 52-week highs AND ≥2.5% at 52-week lows simultaneously. Indicates extreme split market — small group of leaders pulling indices up while broader market deteriorates. Historically precedes drops 30-40 days out, but high false-positive rate (~70%).
164
Kerberos breadth · momentum
McClellan Oscillator + Summation NEW
📅 EOD 2026-05-16 · SP500 full breadth · 19EMA - 39EMA
MetricValue
McClellan Oscillator-18
McClellan Summation-266
Last 5 osc readings-6, -11, -12, -5, -18
Sample (n_days)56
Neutral momentum. Summation index -266 (bearish long-term trend).
How to read
McClellan Oscillator = 19-day EMA of net advances/declines minus 39-day EMA. Above +50 = overbought, below -50 = oversold, > +100/-100 = extreme. Summation index is cumulative, signals long-term trend reversals.

TickerPriceGap %Close %Vol/10dHeld?

14 tickers gapped up ≥5% on heavy volume. 7 held the gap (closed above open) — momentum continuation candidates. The ones that faded are short-squeeze fakes or news pump dumps.
How to read
Gap-and-Go: stock opens significantly higher than previous close on big volume. If it holds the gap (closes above open), momentum often continues 1-3 days. If it fades (closes below open), it's typically a fakeout. Filter requires +5% gap AND volume ≥150% of 10-day average.

40 tickers in stop-loss cascade (5d return < -10%). Volume declining = forced selling exhaustion (potential bottom). Volume rising = real distribution (more downside). Cross-check with cheap options for low-cost long entries.
How to read
Stop-Loss Cascade pattern: initial gap-down, then continuation drift on declining volume = forced margin calls / stop-loss runs. Often the bottom is within 1-2 weeks. Volume decay = exhaustion. Confirm with reversal candle (hammer, doji) before BTFD entry.

Multi-index tape: tracks daily evolution of 4 major US indices. Look for: (1) divergence between large-cap (SPY, DIA) and small-cap (IWM) = leadership shift, (2) volume rising while price falls = distribution, (3) HV30 expanding = vol regime change.
How to read
Pattern from Kerberos thread (image #32): track the same indices day-by-day across vol metrics to spot regime transitions early. Vol rising + price falling on multiple indices = warning. Vol falling + price rising = healthy continuation.
171
Kerberos · smart money vs retail
Index OI-PCR vs Vol-PCR split NEW
📅 EOD 2026-05-16 · 8 major index ETFs · OI vs Vol PCR split
IndexVol-PCROI-PCRPut VolCall VolPut OICall OIRead
SPY0.142.047,49552,244671,063328,718✓ smart money hedged
QQQ0.040.401,74239,21164,922162,676—
IWM8.372.0970,3218,399177,93385,128⚠ panic intraday
DIA0.970.932,3852,45310,70611,502—
EEM0.610.74886.001,4618,09910,984—
GLD0.251.421,8907,65336,35425,577✓ smart money hedged
TLT0.880.9417,01119,242109,720117,155—
OI-PCR (open interest) reflects stable positioning — smart money hedging. Vol-PCR (today's volume) reflects intraday flow — often retail. Big gap = signal: Vol-PCR >> OI-PCR means panic intraday (often buy zone), Vol-PCR << OI-PCR means smart money continues hedging despite calm trading.
How to read
Vol-PCR > 1.5 = bearish flow today. OI-PCR > 1.5 = stable bearish positioning. Comparing the two distinguishes panic (transient) from real distribution (durable). Best Kerberos signal: when OI-PCR rising over weeks alongside calm Vol-PCR — hidden distribution.

📅 EOD 2026-05-16 · 11 GICS sector ETFs · vol + PCR detail
SectorPriceChangeHV30IVX30Vol-PCROI-PCR

Sector internals: which sectors have expensive options (IV high vs HV) vs cheap, and which have bearish positioning (PCR > 1) vs bullish (PCR < 1). Best setups : long premium on cheap-vol sectors, short premium on expensive-vol sectors. Cross-check with sector breadth (% above MA50) for direction.
How to read
11 GICS sectors: each row = one sector ETF. Compare IVX30/HV30 ratio (vol mispricing) and OI-PCR (positioning). Extreme PCR + extreme IV ratio = best directional opportunities. Defensive sectors (XLP, XLU) showing high PCR + high IV = real risk-off.

SFNC21.2730.6%53.9%23.4 pts0.18
Skew = wing IV (out-of-money) − ATM IV. Positive skew = puts/calls are expensive vs ATM (tail risk priced in). Negative skew = wings cheap vs ATM (rare, often pre-merger or stable utility). Top names: best candidates for skew-trade (selling expensive wings, buying cheap ones).
How to read
Volatility smile: in healthy markets, OOTM puts have higher IV than ATM (negative skew of equity index = put expensive). When skew expands, it signals tail-risk fear. When it inverts, it signals call-side speculation (rare, pre-deal). Trade the extremes via risk reversals.

Top WQSR momentum: AXTI (composite z=+5.65). Composite rank captures persistent leaders: strong returns across multiple horizons + high Sharpe. Bottom of table = momentum laggards (potential mean-reversion or value catch-up).
How to read
WQSR (Kerberos thread) ranks stocks by composite of 5-day, 20-day, 60-day, 252-day returns + 1-year Sharpe ratio. Each horizon converted to z-score, then averaged. Top rank = persistent momentum leader. Reversal candidates often in bottom 10%.

Mid-cap heat map (Kerberos thread): top 40 vs bottom 40 by 5-day return. Rotation signal: if mid-cap leaders (top 40) outperform large-cap indices, small/mid-cap leadership is on. If bottom 40 dominate, capitulation in mid-cap segment.
How to read
Heat map approach: visualize sector rotation by ranking ~750 mid-cap names by 5-day return. Top performers = themes with momentum (often future SP500 graduates). Bottom = capitulation candidates with reversal optionality.

Small-cap heat map (Kerberos thread): top 40 / bottom 40 by 5-day return. Riskiest segment: small-caps lead in late-cycle euphoria (FOMO retail) and capitulate first in risk-off.
How to read
Small-caps = early cyclical signals. When IWM (Russell 2000) leads, risk-on broad. When small-cap top 40 has 5d returns > +20% on multiple names, late-cycle euphoria warning. Bottom 40 with -15%+ = capitulation pool for BTFD.

ETF flow proxy via volume intensity (5d avg vs 30d avg). Volume spike + positive return = real inflows / FOMO. Volume spike + negative return = panic outflows / hedge buying. Volume decay = stale theme losing interest.
How to read
Real ETF flows require fund-level reporting (lagged). Proxy via volume intensity catches the same signal: 200%+ of normal volume on price up = inflows, on price down = panic. Cross-check with ratio extremes (cross-asset) to confirm theme.

SPY × EFAIntl developed+0.83+0.88—
1/4 safe-haven correlations aligned today. Risk-on regime — safe-havens not aligning, equities can grind higher.
How to read
When VIX correlation to SPY turns positive (volatility rising as equities fall) AND gold/bonds/dollar all decorrelate negatively from SPY — it's a real risk-off broadcast. Solo signals are noise. The Kerberos rule #4: cross-asset alignment is what makes the signal actionable.
181
Kerberos · dealer positioning
GEX profile (SPY, QQQ, IWM) VALID
📅 EOD 2026-05-16 · GEX profile per strike · 3 major index ETFs
IndexSpotZero ΓMax +ΓGEX +Max -ΓGEX -
SPY739.17692.00740.00186.7M610.00-229,818
QQQ708.93505.00710.0060.3M540.00-33,786
IWM277.60297.00295.009.8M270.00-22.1M
DIA495.37530.00500.002.5M465.00-3.5M
Dealer gamma positioning: Zero gamma = level where dealers flip from long-gamma (stabilizing) to short-gamma (accelerating). Max +Gamma = strike where dealers most long → resistance/magnet (price tends to pin there). Max -Gamma = strike where dealers most short → if breached, acceleration zone. Use these levels for entry/exit precision on 0-7 DTE options.
How to read
GEX (gamma exposure) measures dealer hedging requirements. Above zero gamma = dealers stabilize (bull friendly), below = dealers accelerate moves (volatility regime). Max positive gamma strike acts as resistance/pinning level. Breaking max negative gamma strike = expect rapid acceleration in that direction.
182
Kerberos vol · regime gold standard
VIX term structure (VX1-VX9) VALID
📅 EOD 2026-05-16 · VIX term structure · 4 contracts on the curve
ContractTenorLevel1d Δ5d Δ
VIX 9d9d16.378.12%15.20%
VIX 30d30d18.436.78%7.21%
VIX 3m90d21.362.45%4.20%
VIX 6m180d23.251.17%2.92%
🟢 FULL CONTANGO — calm regime, vol selling tailwind. Healthy contango means short-vol strategies (selling premium) get tailwinds.
How to read
VIX term structure = futures curve of S&P 500 implied volatility. Contango (rising) = market pricing future as more uncertain than now (calm now). Backwardation (falling) = market pricing now as more uncertain than future (crisis now). Front-month VIX above VIX3M is the primary regime change signal Kerberos used since 2018.

Top building: HPQ (+158% premium). 🟢 OPENING (Δ > +30%) = real institutional position. 🔴 CLOSING (Δ < -30%) = position closed. Edge per jbulltard: only 10-15% of unusual flow has true follow-through — these are the OPENING ones.
How to read
options_daily_flow tracks total call/put premium per ticker per day. Premium spikes day-over-day (>+30%) signal new institutional positions opening. Drops (>-30%) signal closures. Filter: prior day premium ≥ $50K to avoid noise. Use this to filter the unusual options screener noise.

12 stocks at 52w highs vs 17 at 52w lows. Mixed market — leadership rotating between sectors. Watch which sectors flip into highs (continuation) vs lows (capitulation). Top sector ranking captures rotation: highs - lows net score.
How to read
Counts how many stocks per GICS sector are at fresh 52-week highs vs lows today. Healthy bull market: highs concentrated in 2-4 leading sectors, broad participation. Topping signal: highs narrowing to 1 sector while others go to lows. Capitulation: most sectors at fresh lows = broad risk-off confirmed.
190
Kerberos vol · variance risk premium
VRP signal (VIX − HV20) NEW
📅 EOD 2026-05-16 · VIX vs realized vol on SPY 20d
MetricValue
VIX (today)18.43
HV20 SPY (annualized %)10.7%
VRP (VIX − HV20)+7.70
Percentile (1y)80%
VerdictSHORT VOL — sell premium
VRP +7.70. Implied vol overpriced vs realized — sell premium tailwind (covered calls, credit spreads, iron condors).
How to read
VRP = VIX (forward 30-day implied vol) minus HV20 (realized 20-day vol annualized). Positive 4-7 typical (vol risk premium). Above +7 = sell premium attractive. Below 0 = market underpricing realized vol, long premium has carry.
191
Kerberos vol · normalized VRP
nVRP composite NEW
📅 EOD 2026-05-16 · nVRP composite (Kerberos hedging signal) · last 5 days
DateVIXHV20 %VRP rawVRP z-score
18.380.10+0.00+0.60
17.990.10+0.00+0.58
17.870.10+0.00+0.57
17.260.10+0.00+0.35
18.430.11+0.00+0.44
nVRP = normalized variance risk premium. z > +1.5 (premium overpriced) → short vol works. z < -1.5 (premium underpriced) → long vol pays. Used in multi-strategy portfolios as the hedging leg.
How to read
Computed from VIX vs realized HV20 SPY. Z-score normalized over 252-day window. Backtested on 11 years: nVRP overlay 50% beat SPY by Sharpe 0.84 vs 0.71. Hedge actif when z < -1.5.

Source: openinsider_period_stats. Cross-reference with capitulation triplet candidates and BTFD setups. Best signal: cluster of 3+ insiders buying simultaneously after 20%+ drawdown.

Worst 42 SP500 names by sustained downtrend + drawdown. Kerberos 'mechanical earnings downside' style — use for SHORT setups pre-earnings (downside continuation). Reverse interpretation: deep value contrarian buys IF haven filter aligns + capitulation triplet active.
How to read
Universe: SP500 full. Filters: (1) 1-year return < -10% (broken trend), (2) 60-day return < 0 (no recovery), (3) drawdown from 52w high > 25% (real damage). Cross-check with earnings calendar — these names approaching earnings are likely to disappoint or gap-down on results.

80 PULLBACK setups. Top trend: BKSY (+97% 60d, RSI 58). Trend continuation trade — buy the dip after intraday pullback in established uptrend. Backtest WR 70%+, Sharpe 1.55.
How to read
PULLBACK setup = stock in confirmed uptrend (above MA50 + 60d positive) experiencing tactical retracement (RSI 35-60, slightly negative 5d return). Best when close to MA20 (acts as support). Stop typically 3×ATR below entry, target 2×ATR above. Hold 10 days.

How to read
BOTTOM setup = oversold + drawdown + recent capitulation. Best entries when bouncing off support (today's close green = reversal hint). Cross-check with haven filter (GLD/HYG/TLT alignment) for risk-off confirmation. ATR stop 2.5×, target 3×, hold 15 days.

ZTS (9 screeners): 🟡 BEARISH TILT. Hedge or watch.

How to read
Each ticker's screener stack reveals a PATTERN, not just a count. TOPPING (retail euphoria + smart-money puts simultaneous) = trim long, often a 1-2 week local top. MOMENTUM SQUEEZE (all bullish: volume + breakout + RSI euphoria) = trade with stop, exit on reversal. CAPITULATION (all bearish: oversold + drawdown + IV crushed) = BTFD candidate when haven filter aligns. DIVERGENCE (mixed bullish + bearish) = wait, signals conflict. HIGH CONVICTION (native:* tag = system-validated trade in best_trades.db) = follow entry rules. 23 screeners aggregated across POLYGON FULL universe (12k tickers OHLCV + SP500 options-based + best_trades.db).

5 setup(s) PRÊT(S) aujourd'hui — top : XOP (base VSA 7j, UNUSUAL 6j, score 100.00/100). PRÊT = base VSA ≥3j + calls inhabituels ≥3j + action pas encore étendue (perf 20j ≤ +8%) — l'état dans lequel était IONQ début avril avant son breakout. EN FORMATION = une seule des deux jambes en place (à surveiller). DÉJÀ PARTI = le move est commencé (perf 20j > +18% ou calls très OTM).
How to read
Setup swing, pas lottery — IONQ n'a jamais été en lottery, c'était une accumulation dans une base. Jouable sur l'action OU en calls 1-3 mois pour le levier (le x5 d'IONQ venait des calls). Cross-check obligatoire avant d'entrer : chart weekly + position dans le 52w (éliminer si > 95% du high), et vérifier qu'il n'y a pas un catalyseur binaire imminent (earnings, FDA). Les patterns VSA d'accumulation = TESTING / NO_SUPPLY / ABSORPTION / STOPPING_VOLUME (le vendeur s'épuise sur le support).
15
Kerberos rule · framework
Buffer 3 jours hard cliff CONCEPT
ConceptBuffer 3 jours hard cliff
SourceKerberos007 — règle générique appliquée à Max Optimism Stack et VIX Spike Detector.
Un trigger ne déclenche l'action qu'après confirmation 3 jours en zone, et le filtre est binaire. Buffer testé : <3j = trop de FP, 3j = optimal (capture COVID 5-day cluster), >3j = rate les corrections rapides. Le hard cliff évite les zones grises où on entre/sort en boucle : soit ON, soit OFF.
How to read
Kerberos007 — règle générique appliquée à Max Optimism Stack et VIX Spike Detector.
16
Kerberos rule · framework
Haven filter (FP eliminator) CONCEPT
ConceptHaven filter (FP eliminator)
SourceKerberos007 — composant clé du Max Optimism Stack 4-bricks.
Pour valider qu'un régime risk-off est réel, on vérifie qu'au moins une couche défensive bouge en accord. GLD momentum 60j ≥ -2% (or pas en chute libre = vrai haven) OU HYG/TLT momentum 30j ≤ +2% (crédit/duration ne sur-performent pas si or rallye). Élimine 100% du FP Spring 2021 sans rater les HITs (COVID 2020 + Bear 2022 + mini-crash août 2024).
How to read
Kerberos007 — composant clé du Max Optimism Stack 4-bricks.
17
Kerberos rule · framework
Composite ≥ 3 signals CONCEPT
ConceptComposite ≥ 3 signals = real edge
SourceKerberos007 — principe #1 du framework.
Un signal solo est du bruit. Trois ou plus qui s'alignent simultanément = edge mesurable. Validé empiriquement par live test : 1 brique seule = noise, 2+ = vrai signal. Tous les composites Kerberos retenus dans le système sont des agrégats 3-5 sous-signaux indépendants : Max Optimism (4 bricks), Composite Divergence (3), VIX Spike Detector (4 tiers), TraderMonty (5).
How to read
Kerberos007 — principe #1 du framework.
18
Kerberos rule · framework
Cross-asset alignment CONCEPT
ConceptCross-asset alignment
SourceKerberos007 — principe #4 du framework.
Un signal isolé sur une seule classe d'actifs ne suffit pas. La signature de stress vrai = alignement multi-actifs simultané : SPX direction + VIX/VVIX + Or (GLD) + Bonds (TLT, HYG) + FX (DXY, EUR, JPY) + Sectors (XLU/XLP defensives vs XLY/XLF cycliques). Application au cross-asset du principe #1 (composite vs solo). Cohérent avec les 53 ratios cross-asset du Kerberos Macro Dashboard.
How to read
Kerberos007 — principe #4 du framework.
19
Kerberos · reference
12 REJECT signals (post-Bonferroni) REJECT
12 Kerberos signals rejected after rigorous Bonferroni MCPT testing. NOT included in scoring or page sections (reference only).
SignalYearWhy REJECT
Hurst exponent2018PF 1.06→1.02 PULLBACK, dégrade train→test
ACF lag-12018Pas d'edge sur top_n ranking
Elder weekly trend gate2018+0.06 Sharpe delta, sous le bar
KAMA Efficiency Ratio201872% signaux en tier négatif, no-op
MTF Stack alignment20180/5 screeners passent bar
Index/Stock Pairs2020REJECT OOS, mean-rev cassée post-2024
Stallman Polished triplet20190/10 paires Bonferroni
SPHB/SPLV ratio z solo2020Direction inverse, ratio 0.49×
NYSE Short Interest solo2020Composite OK (Max Optimism), solo NS
VIX-RV Spread strict2021Signal de chop 120d, pas crash
Sector Jaws 10y2020Direction inverse sur 10y data
Defensive Rotation solo2019Inverse contrarian (bottom-confirmation)
Signal narratifs Kerberos qui ne survivent pas le permutation test rigoureux + Bonferroni. Ne pas re-tester sans nouvelle data ou nouvelle méthode. Pattern méta : confluence > solo, math stable > narratif.
How to read
Chaque entrée = signal Kerberos testé sur ≥10y avec sign-flip permutation test (5000 perms) + Bonferroni correction. Ratio VALID/REJECT global = 6/9 (≈0.67), cohérent avec d'autres études quant signaux narratifs.

Combo backtest: WR 57.9%, mean +3.80%/trade, Sharpe 1.28 (vs 0.84 for daily-only signal — weekly EMA50 filter adds +0.44 Sharpe). Entry-delay validation: J+5 preserves 90% of J0 baseline performance.
How to read
Signal = price daily crosses above EMA(200) daily AND weekly close > weekly EMA(50). Window = 5 trading days (validated). Holding rule = 40 trading days (~2 months). Long-only. Best entries: J0 freshness + weekly filter ON + % Move Since Cross < 3% (avoid chase). Source: ma_cross_screener_results.csv (refreshed daily).

How to read
Weinstein Stage Analysis (Secrets For Profiting in Bull and Bear Markets). Stage 2 = ADVANCING (above SMA50 + slope up), Stage 3 = TOP (rolling over), Stage 4 = DECLINING (below SMA50 + slope down), Stage 1 = BASING. Stage 2 -> long bias, Stage 4 -> short bias.

How to read
Murphy Intermarket Technical Analysis. Rolling correlation 60 days vs 3-year baseline. |z| > 2 sigma = structural rupture = potential regime shift. Pairs: SPY-TLT/GLD/UUP/JNK/USO + TLT-GLD/HYG + QQQ-IWM.
